summary: Made two surgical seam edits: clarified that chapter 5 opens the morning after chapter 4's evening close, and sharpened Marcia's financial inventory so Tiana's northbound school logistics feed more cleanly into chapter 6.
edits: Added an explicit next-morning time anchor to the opening sentence.
Adjusted Marcia's line about Tiana's earnings to point toward paperwork and bus fare beyond Miami.
